'''Slish Fondine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who owned a [[Umgullian blob|blob]] [[Fondine Blob Raceways|corral]] on [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]].

==Biography==
In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] he learned through [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] that the [[Dack|consort]] of the [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] of [[Dargul]] had been using one of his blobs to cheat and earn [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to obtain transport away from Umgul. Slish had wanted to have Dack executed, since cheating in blob racing was a capital crime on that world, but refrained when Calrissian said that such an act could start an inter-system war between Umgul and Dargul. He was later rewarded with a track that was, ironically, named the ''[[Dack Track]]'' by the Duchess [[Mistal]].<ref name="js" />
